video_metadata.description: Two robotic arms (left and right) performing a table-cleaning task — picking up and relocating household objects (sunglasses, cardboard box/tray, tissue, eraser/sponge) onto a green plate and clearing the table surface

actors.description: Robotic arm with black gripper fingers; primarily picks up and deposits objects onto the green plate
Robotic arm with black gripper fingers; handles objects on the right side of the table and cooperates with left hand on larger items

objects.name: green_plate
objects.description: Round green plate used as a collection target for cleaned objects

objects.name: blue_plate
objects.description: Round blue plate, visible in early frames, removed or relocated early

objects.name: tissue_paper
objects.description: Crumpled white tissue/paper, placed on green plate during cleaning

objects.name: cardboard_tray
objects.description: Flat open cardboard box/tray, manipulated and relocated by both hands

objects.name: sunglasses
objects.description: Black sunglasses, picked up and moved during cleaning

objects.name: tissue_box
objects.description: Rectangular tissue box, remains on table as background object throughout

objects.name: black_cup
objects.description: Tall dark cylindrical cup/container, remains on table throughout

objects.name: eraser_sponge
objects.description: Small rectangular grey eraser or sponge, appears after other items are cleared

annotations.description: Left hand is stationary at left edge of table holding or hovering near blue plate area. Right hand is also at rest on right side. Both arms in idle/standby posture before task begins.
visual_cues: Both hands visible at frame edges
Objects scattered on table surface untouched
annotations.notes: Initial idle state; no active manipulation

annotations.description: Right hand is stationary at the right side of the frame in an open/idle posture.
annotations.notes: Both hands idle at task start

annotations.description: Right hand moves inward toward the center of the table, approaching the sunglasses and cardboard tray area.
annotations.notes: First active motion in the sequence; right hand begins task

annotations.description: Left hand begins moving away from the blue plate and toward the tissue/crumpled paper on the table.
visual_cues: Left arm moving right toward tissue
annotations.notes: Left hand starts its own approach simultaneously with right hand

annotations.description: Right hand grasps and picks up the sunglasses, actively manipulating and lifting them from the table surface.
Left hand grasps the crumpled tissue paper and picks it up, beginning to move it toward the green plate.
Left hand deposits tissue onto the green plate and then approaches and grasps the cardboard tray, beginning cooperative manipulation.
visual_cues: Gripper re-opening and moving to cardboard tray
annotations.notes: Deposit-and-regrasp action; transitions into bimanual tray manipulation

annotations.description: Right hand cooperates with left hand to grasp opposite ends of the cardboard tray and move it together.
visual_cues: Both grippers holding tray from opposite sides
annotations.notes: Bimanual cooperative manipulation of large flat object

annotations.description: Right hand releases the cardboard tray and withdraws to the right side of the frame after placing it.
Left hand also releases the tray and briefly withdraws before approaching the next object.
annotations.notes: Short withdrawal phase before transitioning to next pick

annotations.description: Left hand approaches the small grey eraser/sponge that has appeared in the center of the table after previous objects were cleared.
annotations.notes: New object appears after clearing; left hand begins next pick sequence

annotations.description: Right hand remains in a resting position on the right side while left hand handles the remaining object.
annotations.notes: Right hand idle during left hand's final pick

annotations.description: Left hand grasps the eraser/sponge and places it onto or near the green plate, completing the table cleaning task.
visual_cues: Object lifted and carried toward plate
annotations.notes: Final manipulation action; table clearing task completed

annotations.description: Right hand returns to idle/rest position as the task concludes.
visual_cues: Table mostly clear except tissue box and cup
annotations.notes: Task end state; both hands returning to idle

temporal_summary.description: Both hands idle; initial standby before cleaning task begins
Both hands simultaneously approach their respective target objects (sunglasses / tissue)
Right hand grasps sunglasses; left hand grasps tissue paper and moves it to green plate
Bimanual cooperative manipulation — both hands grasp and relocate the cardboard tray together
Both hands release tray and withdraw; brief transition/rest phase
Left hand approaches grey eraser/sponge; right hand remains idle
Left hand grasps and places final object; task complete, arms return to idle

advance_time_expectations.description: With 2-second prediction horizon, system should predict intents 1-2 seconds before they fully manifest
advance_time_expectations.approach: Should predict at t=2-6s for events 3-4, t=22-27s for event 11
advance_time_expectations.gesture: Should predict at t=6-11s for events 5-6, t=11-17s for events 7-8, t=27-32s for event 13
advance_time_expectations.withdraw: Should predict at t=18-22s for events 9-10

challenging_aspects: No audio — system must rely entirely on visual cues
Two actors (hands) — simultaneous actions require per-actor tracking
Bimanual cooperation — events 7-8 involve both hands on the same object requiring coordination detection
Object variety — multiple different everyday objects with varied shapes and sizes
Object occlusion — arms and grippers frequently occlude table objects during manipulation
Blue plate disappears — early scene change may confuse object tracking models
New object appearance — eraser/sponge appears mid-video after table is partially cleared

notes: Video has no audio track, so audio-based intents will not be detected
System should focus on arm trajectory and gripper aperture for intent classification
Bimanual events should be tracked per-actor independently
Prediction interval of 2s aligns well with action durations in this video
Fast mode recommended for efficiency in this controlled-environment scenario

usage_notes.testing: Run: python file_based_predictor.py --frames-dir test_data/cleaning/frames/ --audio-file test_data/cleaning/audio.wav --output results/cleaning_predictions.jsonl
usage_notes.expected_results: Detection rate >70% for gesture/approach, advance time 1-2 seconds, latency <800ms
